Amended Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

APPEARANCES: Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. of Legal Assistance to the Elderly, Inc.; pltf waived appearance in papers.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling, as proof having been provided to the Court, the claim of exemption is granted. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported
